tribe_description:
They shop for at-home grooming, beauty, and therapeutic devices the way a pragmatic pro would stock a kit: the product only becomes “real” when it produces a specific finished end-state and keeps doing it under normal, repeatable use. They don’t treat spec lists, accessory callouts, or “advanced tech” language as evidence. The proof they trust is either (a) a socially legible result that reads as done—portrait-ready grooming, a clean hairline, a maintained bald/finished look—or (b) durable body progress that survives a protocol over weeks.

This tribe’s default stance is corrective realism. When marketing implies the device will do the work, they translate the claim into the actual partnership: what the user must still do (pressure, motion, angles, pacing) and what the tool genuinely amplifies (power, consistency, speed). But they also have a second mode: when something is truly hands-off and still delivers, autonomy becomes the headline, and they’ll validate it with a near-professional benchmark (“only a pro would beat it”) rather than walking the reader through features.

Their reviews are built around fairness-through-constraints, but not as a mandatory script. If the reviewer’s proof is already decisive—finished outcome plus obvious kit completeness—they may skip the technique caveats, battery talk, or extra justifications entirely. Constraints show up when they’re necessary to protect another shopper from fantasy: when results depend on skill, when performance has a ceiling (“good in a pinch”), or when a ‘pro’ promise needs a cause→effect chain grounded in lived results.

Value, for them, is not abstract “usefulness.” It’s ownership that sticks: a tool is worth it when it locks into rotation (nightly, travel-ready, hard to imagine not having it), or when a kit feels complete and pro-grade in hand—solving multiple real grooming problems without forcing the buyer into add-ons. They’ll sometimes endorse merely adequate core performance if readiness is the real reason it stays used.

They also allow identity to be a primary justification when baseline competence is cleared. Sleek, sexy, modern design and the way a tool protects feeling feminine/put-together can be treated as performance—without inventing technical explanations to launder an aesthetic win. Across categories, their reviews read like decision-grade reality checks: what outcome you can honestly expect, whether it’s you-or-the-tool doing the work, what makes it a keeper, and what kind of buyer will actually be satisfied.
tribe_definition: A tribe of practical beauty enthusiasts who get genuinely excited about products that fit their interests. They generally prioritize everyday usefulness, beauty and personal appearance.
population_definition: Health-conscious consumers who evaluate supplements, personal care, and wellness products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When evaluating beauty or grooming tools, they run a proof-of-finish test and treat the most outcome-relevant end state as the truth (e.g., a clean hairline, maintained bald look, portrait-ready grooming). In reviews they lead with that named finish and often add a practical ceiling—what it can and can’t realistically achieve—so a buyer can calibrate expectations. They don’t promote “works fine” as a verdict unless it maps to a finished result someone would recognize in real life.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Across batches 7–10, gaps repeatedly show they validate with a specific finished, social-proof-ready outcome and explicit ceilings, while predictions substituted generic competence or feature validation for that finish (HIGH; recurring across multiple products).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When describing product experience, they use sensory language (soft, silky, soothing) as supporting evidence only after the core job is established. If the product underperforms on the primary task, they demote comfort into a footnote rather than letting it rescue the verdict. They treat “feels good” as meaningful only when it helps explain why the result is achievable or repeatable.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Batch 8 gaps again show predictions trying to make pleasant after-feel or convenience carry the proof, while this tribe keeps comfort secondary to outcome ceilings and repeatable use (MED; consistent with earlier windows).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When reviewing, they write like a peer coach who endorses with conditions rather than hype. They’ll name limits ("in a pinch," missing pieces, technique required) even inside an overall positive review, because they see expectation-setting as part of fairness. Their praise is typically framed as: here’s what it reliably does, here’s what it doesn’t, and who will (or won’t) be happy with it.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Batches 7–10 continue to penalize predictions that smooth claims into stronger everyday-efficacy; this tribe preserves caps and routing (“who it’s for”) as a fairness norm, while also showing they won’t force caveats when the proof is already decisive (MED-HIGH; recurring with added nuance in batch 10).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a product’s results depend on user action, they make that dependency explicit and judge whether the device meaningfully amplifies competent effort. They push back on implied automation by stating what the user still must do (motion, pressure, angles) and crediting the tool only for the added assist. When a device truly is hands-free and can ‘go to work’ on its own, they treat that autonomy as the main proof and validate it by benchmarking against professional service outcomes rather than listing features.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Batches 8–10 repeatedly show them correcting automation assumptions and, when autonomy is real, elevating “sit back and let it work” plus near-pro comparisons as the primary proof while predictions diluted this into operational steps or accessory/spec justification (HIGH; multi-batch).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When assessing kits or multi-attachment devices, they judge value through coverage completeness and pro-grade feel in-hand: does it solve multiple real grooming problems without add-on shopping. They may demonstrate breadth by naming zones, but they don’t force a granular zone inventory if the kit’s completeness is already obvious. If the kit reads like vague versatility or minor touch-ups, they downgrade it even if the main unit basically works.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Batches 7–10 reinforce that completeness + pro-grade feel can be sufficient proof on its own; batch 10 specifically shows predictions wrongly injecting technique ceilings when the actual proof was simply outcome + kit completeness (HIGH; consistent refinement).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When evaluating powered tools, they treat readiness logistics as first-class performance—but they only foreground it when it is the reason the product survives in their life. If a tool becomes a staple because it’s reliably charged, quick to top up, and travel-friendly, they’ll recommend it even while admitting the core performance is merely adequate. If the reviewer’s proof is already outcome + completeness, they may not add battery/rotation rationale at all, because they won’t pad the case with convenience claims they didn’t use to decide.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Batch 9 shows readiness can be the deciding reason they keep an ‘okay in a pinch’ tool, while batch 10 shows predictions over-injected battery/rotation language even when the actual logic didn’t rely on it; together this clarifies readiness as a conditional lead, not mandatory filler (HIGH; pattern across two batches).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a product has handling hazards, they include short, blunt warnings as a responsibility to other shoppers rather than elaborate speculation. They aim to prevent the obvious mistake and treat that warning as part of the product’s real-world use conditions. They also note missing instructions as an integrity signal, but they calibrate its importance instead of letting documentation dominate the whole verdict.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Batch 7 shows their safety move is a concrete directive tied to an observed hazard and that documentation is only mentioned when experienced, not as generic expectation-setting (MED-HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When proving performance in a review, they prefer the shortest credible proof that matches the claim: a finished look, a near-pro benchmark, or a clear routine outcome. They avoid padding with feature callouts or invented step-by-step narration when the result is self-evident, and they won’t add technique warnings just to sound balanced. They become instructional only when technique/protocol is the swing factor that determines whether another buyer will succeed.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Batch 10 shows they may rely on outcome + pro-level comparison without feature validation, and that predictions over-added steps, accessories, and caveats; earlier batches already established outcome-first brevity unless technique is decisive (HIGH; strengthened by new gaps).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a product is positioned as a professional substitute (salon, spa, pro massage), they validate the claim by either a near-pro comparison or a coherent cause→effect chain that ties features to downstream results. They don’t accept generic “salon-quality” phrasing, and they also don’t prove it with over-specific hair/body micro-details that weren’t actually experienced. If the chain isn’t supported by lived results, they treat the pro claim as marketing, not evidence.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Batch 9 shows their pro-at-home proof is a tight feature→outcome chain (damage/frizz/static/moisture) rather than embellished micro-specifics, and batch 10 shows near-pro benchmarking is itself treated as primary evidence (MED-HIGH; reinforced).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a tool is also a style or identity object, they may evaluate aesthetics and self-image payoff first—sexiness, modernity, feeling feminine/put-together—while offering only baseline functional confirmation. They won’t invent technical grooming justifications to legitimize an aesthetic win; they’ll simply say the look/feel is the point once basic usability clears. If baseline competence fails, the identity upside doesn’t survive the verdict.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Batch 9–10 gaps reiterate that predictions over-forced technical performance and rotation logic when the actual reviewer’s primary proof was identity/aesthetic payoff plus minimal competence (HIGH; multi-batch).

main.text: When shopping for beauty and body-care items, they’re motivated by visible, confidence-restoring results that still feel controllable. They want outcomes that look clearly “done” (finished grooming, real relief) because the purchase is tied to self-presentation and day-to-day capability. If the difference isn’t noticeable, they treat the product as noise—no amount of pleasant feel can compensate.
main.rationalization: Batches 7–10 continue to prioritize named finished outcomes and near-pro comparisons as proof, while gaps show predictions trying to replace that proof with features, generic competence, or comfort narratives (MED-HIGH; recurring).

main.text: When choosing between similar tools, they’re pulled toward items that make the routine feel satisfying in the moment, but only after the tool earns that pleasure by working. Sensory enjoyment becomes the reason they keep reaching for it, not the reason they overlook weak performance. They describe this as an upgrade to daily maintenance rather than indulgence for its own sake.
main.rationalization: Batch 8 repeats the gap where predictions try to crown pleasant after-feel as the main proof; for this tribe, enjoyment only matters after outcome and rotation are secured (MED).

main.text: When buying tools that require steps, they’re motivated by simplification that is realistic—not magical. They accept manual effort as normal but want the device to add meaningful assist (power, consistency, speed) so the result becomes achievable at home. Claims that imply the device does everything are rejected because they conflict with how they believe tools actually work.
main.rationalization: Batches 8–10 show them insisting on labor realism and resisting implied automation, while rewarding true autonomy as a distinct value category rather than dressed-up manual operation (HIGH).

main.text: When weighing value, they don’t just look for low price; they look for the reason a product becomes a keeper—either rotation lock-in (nightly/travel-ready) or kit completeness that prevents add-on shopping. They’ll call something a great buy if it creates dependency (“hard to imagine not having this”), even when they openly cap performance as “in a pinch.” They treat missing documentation as a small integrity ding only when it was actually encountered in use.
main.rationalization: Batch 10 reinforces value-as-adoption/keeper logic versus generic usefulness/extras, while batch 9 shows they may recommend ‘okay’ performance because readiness is the deciding reason it stays used (HIGH; reinforced).

main.text: When they leave a review, they’re motivated to be a trustworthy peer who prevents wasted money and avoidable mistakes. They include constraints, technique dependencies, and “who this is for” guidance when those factors determine outcomes, but they won’t manufacture caveats just to sound balanced. Helpfulness is measured by calibrated truth—what actually served as proof for them—rather than by spec recitation or filler reassurance.
main.rationalization: Batch 10 shows they may not add technique/battery rationale when outcome + completeness already proves the case, while earlier gaps show they do add constraints when technique or ceilings truly matter (MED-HIGH; nuance added).

main.text: When evaluating products related to appearance, they’re motivated by embodied identity benefits—feeling feminine, sexy, modern, or ‘put together’—and treat that as part of performance, not a guilty aside. A sleek or uniquely designed tool can win on identity grounds once baseline usability is met, and they won’t force technical trim-science into the justification if the look-and-feel is the point. They also treat on-demand readiness as one way to protect that identity in real life, when it is the deciding factor for use.
main.rationalization: Batch 9–10 gaps show identity/aesthetic payoff can be primary with light functional proof, and also show readiness is invoked when it truly explains adoption—not as universal padding (HIGH; reinforced).

main.text: When personal health, pain, or rehab is involved, they’re motivated by reliable progress over time and want proof that holds up under a routine. They report usage like a protocol—frequency, session length, injury context, and magnitude of change—because adherence is part of whether the product is ‘real.’ One-off impressions or swapped-in goals are treated as weak evidence for strong claims.
main.rationalization: Batch 9 reaffirms that therapeutic credibility comes from long-horizon adherence with specific protocol parameters, not short trials or generalized relief claims (HIGH).

implicit_goals.text: When buying at-home tools, they aim to reach a finish that stands up in public: either a visibly completed grooming result or relief/intensity that feels legitimately comparable to a service. They want to know the practical ceiling and, when applicable, whether the tool can credibly be described as near-pro—not because of its specs, but because the outcome is hard to beat. Their ideal purchase is the one that makes a service feel optional, not merely supplemented.
implicit_goals.rationalization: Batch 10 adds that near-pro comparison itself is treated as primary proof (and predictions wrongly shifted proof to features), while prior batches already established their ceiling-first mindset (HIGH; refined).

implicit_goals.text: When they write reviews, they aim to give decision-grade expectation control without padding: the finish they actually got, what made it possible (technique vs autonomy), and the conditions that limit results. They keep proof simple when it’s obvious (finished look, pro-level benchmark, kit completeness) and only become instructional when technique or protocol determines success. The goal is that another buyer can predict their own experience without being oversold by specs, vibes, or manufactured caveats.
implicit_goals.rationalization: Batches 9–10 show they prefer decisive proof modes (outcome, autonomy, pro benchmark) and resist injected filler (steps, battery talk, unnecessary warnings) unless it truly drove success (HIGH; strengthened).

implicit_goals.text: When selecting products for ongoing routines, they aim for a setup that either becomes indispensable through rotation or feels complete enough to stop the search. They’re optimizing for ‘kept in rotation’ rather than ‘lives in a drawer,’ but they don’t require rotation language in every evaluation—only when readiness/adoption is the real reason the product wins despite performance limits. They also treat completeness and pro-grade feel as a way to reduce friction and protect on-demand self-presentation.
implicit_goals.rationalization: Batch 9 shows readiness can be the decisive reason to keep an ‘okay’ performer, while batch 10 shows they may omit readiness when outcome + completeness already proves value; together this refines rotation as a conditional goal signal (HIGH; refined).

AFTLUVGQWKW6XSQ5TB6UER5Q263A.review_text:
I’ve used many Korean face masks before but never a hair mask specifically! I love that the treatments come packaged in individual pouches (which makes them perfect for travel), and I like that they come as a boxed set. After shampooing my hair and brushing it straight, it tucks easily into one of these pre-filled bags, and it’s simple enough to squish and massage the conditioning product around. I usually keep one on for a couple of hours, and it seems like the body heat associated with activity and movement helps the essence really penetrate every strand.

The attached straps are easy to affix and release, and the product washes out smoothly enough and manages to leave my hair super shiny too! I love that this formula contains a blend of kernel oil, fermented yeast extract, and soybean seeds because they mix nicely with all of the floral notes and botanical aromas! These deep-conditioning treatments seem to work wonders for my color-treated and often heat-styled hair!

AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.review_text: I was concerned this builder gel would be difficult to work with based only on how runny it looks in the product pix.  In real life it looks runny and sticky, but is surprisingly easy to work with.  After applying a long bead of the gel with the included brush, I pushed the gel to my desired shape, and then let it self level to smooth itself out.  On both thick and thin layers very little effort was required on my part.  In fact, if I tried to get the shape perfect with the brush, the gel got stickier and messier, so I quickly learned to let the gel smooth itself out.  Tip: once you get your shape all smoothed out, turn your nail upside down and let gravity create a natural apex before popping it under the lamp. So far I’ve only used the clear gel.  I created on extension (not shown), attached rhinestones to several pride nails, and fully encapsulated a fully covered rhinestone nail.  1 thick layer of this hard gel and a have encased rhinestones that fully cured in just over 2 minutes!  I also plan to use this for simple overlays when my nail need additional support.  The sticker nail forms work well, the slip solution is good for clean up work (not shaping the gel), and the brush/spatula tool work as expected.  The tiny buffer and file are silly...why include tools that won’t last a day?  Best off all, the gel containers are pretty big... these will last me awhile!

AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.product_description: Nose Pore Wax Strips for hair removal
AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.review_text: My aesthetician told me that the moisture barrier on my skin was breaking down (yikes) and that I should add Niacinamide to my skincare regime.  Hyalauranic aside serum increases the skins ability to absorb moisture,  Niacinamide helps keep the moisture in.  This cream has a lovely scent, is super light and absorbs easily, without leaving my skin oily or heavy...I absolutely love it.  I apply it right after my HA serum in the morning, and follow it with a moisturizer.  After just a few days there’s a noticeable improvement in my skins moisture level and my skin tone has improved.  I’m really happy with the cream!

AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.product_description: 💅🏼 ACRYLIC LIQUID HOLDER - Perfectly holds any acrylic liquid powder for all your nail art you need! 💅🏼 BUBBLE WRAPPED PACKAGING - Our Dappen Dishes come bubble wrapped to ensure each product has proper protection to arrive at your house safely. 💅🏼 GET THOSE NAILS DID - Great nails come with great responsibility, that is why starting with a high-quality nail monomer dish is essential for everyday nail perfection. 💅🏼 EASE OF USE - These glass dappen dishes can be used for natural nails, false nails, and acrylic nails. 💅🏼 NAIL POLISH CLEAN UP - Perfect for putting alcohol in for gel polish clean up or acetone for regular polish.
AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.review_text: Such a simple design, yet so hard to find!  These glass dipping jars are about the same size as the caps on acetone polish remover.  They're small, but hold the perfect amount of acetone in one and alcohol in the other that's needed for a gel mani and tool clean-up.  Super easy to clean, they won't break down over time, and they take up no space in my travel kit.  Perfect!

AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.product_description: WIS Hyaluronic Acid Facial Masks for Women Anti Aging, Moisturizing for All Skin Type 24 Pcs Sheet Mask, Daily Skin Care
AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.review_text: I like these face masks, and for the price, they cant’t be beat!  Pros:  they stay in place without slipping or dripping, even while I move around; within an hour of use my skin feels more moisturized,; after several uses my skin looks more plumped; non-irritating and scent free; they cover my entire face; and of course, at about $1 each, the price is great!  Cons:  the masks are folded with a backing sheet but are still trickier than most to unfold; the eye holes are a little small; and my skin feels sticky after I remove the masks and pat in the remaining serum, so I have to splash cool water to get my skin feeling clean.  Overall, these are a great as a daily mask!

AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.product_description: Spanature Aloe Vera Hand & Body Lotion Travel Size Selection, 4 Pack, Relaxing and Revitalizing Moisturizer for Rough and Dry Skin, Nourishing and Gentle for All Skin Types, Made In Korea - 75 ml/2.53oz
AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.review_text: I absolutely love the scent of this lotion...it's lovely, but subtle and not overpowering.  The lotion has a nice medium consistency and absorbs nicely and doesn't leave a greasy residue, but it does take a couple of minutes.  I use this lotion on my hands, keeping it in my bag, car and on the nightstand.  My only issue is that the moisture it creates doesn't last long...I have to reapply it frequently...like every couple of hours  But let's be fair...at roughly $4/tube, this lotion is a fantastic value!

AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.product_description: MISS SPA Head to Toe Body and Facial Mask Set, Brighten Under-Eye, Deep Therapy Lip Mask, Moisturizing Foot Booties, Anti-Aging, Anti-Wrinkle, Skin Care for Women, 3-Pack
AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.review_text: I had mixed results with these 3 products.  The eye patches are gel patches and not meant to be wet with serum - the serum is released by the gel when it's in contact with skin.  The patches easily stayed in place, but resulted in no visible improvements, and left my undereye area feeling a little dehydrated.  The lip patch is also a gel patch.  It was odd to wear, but it stayed on while I moved around and almost seemed to form a suction seal around my mouth after 10 minutes.  I liked this patch - it left my lips smooth and soft for a day and a half...nice!  The foot booties are for moisturizing only...these are NOT exfoliating booties that take days to work and lead to skin peeling.  They were easy to use and comfortable to wear.  I wore them for 30 minutes and was quite pleased with how soft my feet still felt after 2 days.  My only issue was that after removing the booties I had to spend a good amount of time massaging in the lotion left on my feet...seriously, even after trying to dry them with a towel my feet felt greasy.  Be sure to allow time for the product to absorb afterwards and don't plan to run out the door like I did.  For all of this, I would give the set 4 stars.  However, there's an EXCESSIVE amount of packaging.  The patches all have plastic protectors on both sides, are enclosed in plastic clam shells, and are sealed in the final package.  I felt guiltier than usual when I saw the pile of trash I generated by using this set...these items are definitely over packaged.

AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.product_description: Spanature Lavender Hand & Body Lotion Travel Size Selection 4 Pack, Relaxing and Revitalizing Moisturizer for Rough and Dry Skin, Nourishing and Gentle for All Skin Types, Made In Korea - 75 ml/2.53oz
AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.review_text: What a great buy!  I’m constantly putting lotion on my hands, especially during the winter, and keep travel size lotions everywhere.  This lotion comes in the perfect size for my bag, my desk, the night stand, and the car.  The lotion itself has a lovely lavender scent.  It’s not artificial or overwhelming like perfume, but smells botanical, like real lavender.  The lotion has a medium consistency and quickly absorbs, leaving a slight, non-greasy shine on my hands that makes them look less dry.  The scent fades quickly, but my hands feel soft and moisturized for hours...love it!  And, each lotion comes in an unbranded gift box, making them very giftable!

AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.product_description: FRESHME Mud Mask - Facial Mask Kaolinite Clay Masks Cleansing and Moisturizing Brightening Smoothing Face Mask, 3.4 fl oz
AGSVNZDZNPCMXG5DEFXMZNRH2LCQ.review_text: First, Pelargonium Graveolens = Rose Geranium (I had to look it up!).  Fancy flower aside, this mask has absolutely no scent.  One of the main reasons I ordered this was because I expected a pleasant scent, so this was disappointing.  The mud is very thin and a little watery which was surprising.  Ultimately the mud doesn’t fully dry or pull my skin, and it’s pretty easy to wash off...no dried mud on my hairline!  There are little bits of something in the mud, leaves I think, that I don’t care for.  They’re aren’t a lot of them, so it seems like this wasn’t intentional and may be a quality control issue.  Up close the bits look a little rotten and rather unappealing.  After 15 minutes my pores look a little tighter, the few tiny blackheads I have are still there, and I can’t really say my skin feels more hydrated.  It doesn’t feel dry, it pretty much feels like it always does.  The packaging, as with all Freshme products is lovely, with the tube of mud packaged inside a matching box, so very giftable.  Personally, I prefer the Freshme sheet masks to this mud.  The clarifying benefits I expect from a mud mask just aren’t as obvious as I’d hoped.

AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.product_description: Magnetic Eyelashes With Eyeliner Kit,10 Pairs Eyelashes Magnetic 2021 Upgraded 3D Fluffy Natural Waterproof Reusable Fox Eyes Kit False Eyelashes And Eyeliner.
AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.review_text: I love these! They're super easy to use. The liner goes on smooth and the lashes adhere without much effort. They stay on all day and I don't have to worry about the edges coming up. The removal is super easy and I love that the lashes are reusable. All in all, a great product I have used multiple times and am not disappointed!

AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.product_description: Lavender Foot Peel Mask 2 Pcs for Softing Smoothing Feet,Peeling Away Calluses and Dead Skin CellsExfoliating Foot Mask,Repair Rough Heels,Get Silky Feet
AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.review_text: I didn't think this would work but it does! It definitely makes your feet peel and after it's all done they are baby smooth. AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.product_description: KXAMELIE Nude Pink Press on Nails with White Stripe Designs Glossy Full Cover Medium Short Fake Nails Glue on Nails Tips stick on nails for Women Girls Finger Manicure 24 PCS
AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.review_text: These nails are really pretty and have a great variety of colors. They are fairly long but I like that. I can cut and file them to size. AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.product_description: 2Pcs Mascara Black Volume and Length 4D Natural and Long Lasting Lash Blast Mascara, 0.27 Fl Oz
AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.review_text: I am very impressed with this mascara! It goes on very smoothly and creates a very pretty, long and bold lash. The mascara itself feels light on my lashes and dries quickly.

AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.product_description: Lip Liner Set 12 Colors Natural Lip Liner Makeup Pencil Long Lasting Matte Velvet Lip Liner

AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.product_description: Black Wolf - Men’s Ultra Hydrating Moisturizer - 1.7 Fl Oz – Soothe Dry, Patchy & Flaky Areas on your Skin - Fast Absorbing Formula Won't Feel Heavy or Greasy - Sulfate Free for Dry Skin
AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.review_text: I like to use this moisturizer after I use the Black Wolf charcoal mask. It helps moisturize my skin and calm it afterwards. AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.product_description: Blue Sage De-Puffing Caffeine Eye Serum | Natural Anti-Aging Eye Treatment with Probiotics, Green Tea + Hyaluronic Acid Serum for Face to Tighten and Hydrate under Eye Skin, and Brighten Dark Circles
AEHJ6W3IGWCEJGQMOGRTSRHMCUNA.review_text: I couldn't use this product at all. Any time I tried to apply to my under eye it would burn really badly. I would have to immediately wipe it off. I always used a clean face when I applied this and it still burned.

AGNTJQ2C66IPH76GICZOP4DYBA3Q.review_text: I love Carol's Daughters products and this leave in is a constant staple in my hair care. I usually get it at Target but I ran out and didn't feel like running out and was pleasantly surprised to find its even a bit cheaper on Amazon. I have fine, thin hair that is regularly color treated and sometimes heat styled. This is one of the products that keeps my hair healthy, despite the abuse it takes. When I wash my hair, I'll usually spray into damp hair from midlengths to ends so it doesn't weigh down my fine hair at the roots. It really nourishes my hair, keeping it soft, silky, shiny and healthy. I love the smell. At night, I mist my hair from roots to ends and leave in over night. It's a bit more expensive than other drugstore brands, but it's worth the extra money hands down

AGNTJQ2C66IPH76GICZOP4DYBA3Q.product_description: Ovonni Facial Steamer Nano Ionic Hot Mist Personal Home Sauna SPA Moisturizing Face Sprayer with Mirror, Professional Face Steam Machine for Acne Skin Unclog Pores, White
AGNTJQ2C66IPH76GICZOP4DYBA3Q.review_text: I am very big on skincare and have been wanting a facial steamer for some time now. I'm so glad I finally got one. This is perfect for my needs. I fill the water tank with distilled water and I get about a 20 min spa steam each use. After steaming, I immediately apply a face mask, usually a sea mud or clay mask... They work exceptionally well when the steamer has opened your pores. It's easy to use, easy to maintain, and allows you a spa like experience at your own home. Even though I received this at a discount.. This is my honest opinion and feel it's worth every penny

AGNTJQ2C66IPH76GICZOP4DYBA3Q.product_description: Acelane Jade Roller for Face Anti-aging Facial Roller Natural Jade Stone Wrinkles Puffiness Massager Treatment Beauty Tool for Slimming Toning Firming Eyes Neck Body Skin Rejuvenate
AGNTJQ2C66IPH76GICZOP4DYBA3Q.review_text: I am very religious about my skin care and surprisingly I have never used a jade roller until now. I use a derma roller, a facial stream mister machine, a24ct good vibrating and and LED light therapy. I guess I figured I didn't need ANOTHER skin care device.. But I've been proven wrong. I've been using it once a day now for over 2 weeks and they really do show results. But only the immediate and temporary lifting effect you get right after using but now I can clearly see the contours of my face much more clearly, and sharper than before. My skin now looks tighter and almost like a had a mini face tuck.  I admit that I honestly did not think a jade roller was really something that would live up to the hype about it in all the beauty and skin care blogs /magazines, but I underestimated it.  I know a lot of people put their in the fridge prior to use, but I find the stone itself is cool enough Ashdod my skin without putting it in my refrigerator.. The stone is very delicate and easily breakable and I can just imagine my Daughter or Fiancee accidentally knocking it into the kitchen floor.  I love that it has 2 sides.. A large roller and a small one for areas such as your eyes and around your mouth. I have no complaints whatsoever with this particular roller.. It shows results, glides over my skin smoothly.. The roller never skips it gets stuck, and it even came with a little diagram showing you the best direction to roll in on each part of your face for optimum results. So, if anyone has been curious about jade rollers, I recommend you give it a try. Just follow the diagram to see best results and follow the care instructions so that your roller lasts as long as possible (just includes cleaning of with a damp washcloth and doing with a terry cloth before putting it back in the box. You'll immediately notice just how much faster your skin care absorbs fully and deeper into your skin. I always use either the Sunday Riley C.E.O. Glow Face Oil, Loreal Age Perfect Face Oil during the day and either the Biossance Squallene Oil or S.R. Luna Sleeping Night Oil as my last skin care step before using the roller and the time difference is it if this world. I used to get super impatient waiting for my face oil to absorb so I could start applying makeup or finish my night routine,but the recommended 10 min a day with the roller and there's not even a trace of an oily residue in my face!  I did receive this product at a discounted price but if it ever were to break, I'd definitely buy another Jade a roller to replace it!

I've used skin care products from this brand before and have airways been satisfied, so when I saw a lotion with this fragrance, I had to have it. I use essential oils for so many different things, including a diffuser and I love the smell of Lemongrass!  I'm a skin care fanatic, and not just my face. I exfoliate my body regularly and use a good moisturizer or body oil every day because I used to get such dry and itchy skin on my legs that I couldn't stop scratching.. Even after I drew blood. This nut only had a reviving, fresh smell but it is extremely moisturizing. It's not a thin lotion but it's not as thick as a lot of other lotions I've used. It's the perfect consistency, that when I apply it to my damp skin, it's already absorbed by the time I'm ready to towel dry. It doesn't leave a slick or white residue behind either.. Just super soft skin with a scent that never fails to boost my mood and I like that the smell stays with me through a lot of the day instead of fading 20 min after using. I did receive this at a discounted price, but I would and will pay full price for this product, and not only because it's the best smelling lotion in my opinion, but because it's super effective and the tube goes a long way since you need a lot less product than you think you do. I would definitely regimens this Lorton brand!

Wow.. I was seriously taken back by this Palette. AGNTJQ2C66IPH76GICZOP4DYBA3Q.product_description: SKEDERM EXHYDRO Ceramide Complex Moisturizer, Intensive Repair and Hydration Daily Face Cream, 50ml
AGNTJQ2C66IPH76GICZOP4DYBA3Q.review_text: I have come to trust and love Skederm products but this creamier cream has  been one of my favorites. Because of this... AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: Sorbient Cartridge for BLADELIFE Razor Holder and Travel Case, Extracts Moisture to Keep Blade Dry and Sharp, Doubles Blade Life- 2 PACK
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: Easily replaceable and simple to use. Conserves the blade in your shaver really well and keeps out moisture. Really like using this.

AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: MERISIHAIR Short Bob Wig with Bangs,Straight Black Bob Wigs for Women,Natural Short Synthetic Bob Wig 11inch(Black)
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: I don't know why I even tried with this wig. The part is nice but....yeah....too white to look like a my hair part color. AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: Eyenjoy Poly Gel Nail Kit,Nail Builder Gel Extension Nail Gel Kit,6 Regular Color Nail Extension Slip Solution Professional Kit for DIY Mother Girl Gift
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: This poly-gel kit was so easy to use and apply. It comes with everything you need and is easy to mold onto your mail or with the nail mold. The slip solution works well. The base and top coats are a nice consistency to where you can build on them. It cures really quickly and has a nice gloss to it from the top coat. I tried to blend the two pinks and it didn't turn out exactly as I planned but that's okay.

AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: Beuaty Star 3PCS Poly Nail Gel Kit 30ml, Extension Gel Trial Kit Nail Enhancement Builder Gel Professional Nail Gel All-in One with with Base Top Coat
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: This poly-gel was a little frustrating to work with. It comes out of the tube a little thick and the slip solution does little to even it out thinly. The base coat is fine but the top coat is super thick and you have to be careful not to put too much on your nail. The nail file works well as do the brush and gel tool. I have tried the nail art tool yet but I'm sure they work fine. The poly- gel also leaves a little residue on the edge of your fingers which I don't like. Even after cured with the top coat out still feels like it's not dried/cured all the way. It doesn't feel heavy on your nails though so that's a good thing and the colors are pretty (clear, white and pink).

AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: Glitter Poly Nail Gel Extensions Builder Gel UV/LED Soak Off Acrylic Fashion Gel Polish Set for Nails Beginner DIY Nail Art at Home 8 colors-15g (Pink series)
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: I'm disappointed with this poly gel kit. The poly gels are thick and really easy to use. The kit comes in really pretty colors including 2 glitter poly gel. I just hate that it didn't last long.

AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: BEPHOLAN Natural Eyelash Growth Serum and Brow Enhancer to Grow Thicker, Longer Lashes for Long, Luscious Lashes and Eyebrows|15ML
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: Such a great eyelash serum and I so love that it's in the form of an eyelash brush versus the thin brushes I've used in the past. I feel like using the eyelash brush is way better and applies more evenly than anything else and I'm able to get my lashes from the root to the end of the lash with the serum. I also like how I'm killing two birds with one stone by using the serum and also curling my lashes at the same time. I've used it with my contacts on and had not problems with the serum or brush.

AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: Pine Gel Nail Polish Set 6 Colors Purple Blue Cat Eye Glitter Gel Polish 7.5 ml Soak Off UV LED Cure Home Salon Manicure
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: These polishes are thick and only truly require one coat to cure and be done. I love that the colors are on the top of the bottles for you to know which one you're using. I forgot to use the magnet to get the cat eye effect but will try it later before curing the polish. I like the various shades of blues and purples in the set. Despite how thick it is, it only took one time to cure and dry which is a huge plus since you have to wait a while for a thick regular polish to dry.

AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: Whisper 90mL, a skin caressing floral Eau De Parfum for Women with calm base notes of Musk, delicate Fruity middle tones by perfume artisan Swiss Arabian
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: I'm not too big on perfumes but decided to try this one to see if it would be something I liked. It is! The scent is like a fruity musk scent but very light and lasts for some time. I tried it first on the inside of my elbow to make sure I didn't have any negative reactions to it and I got hooked from the first smell. I've gotten a few compliments about the smell being nice and others wanting to know what perfume I'm wearing. Be careful not to spray too much so it's not overwhelming and honestly you don't need to spray that much for it to last. I also like the bottle and the tassels around it. Very well designed bottle and in my favorite color so that was a plus. It was also packaged very well too. I can give my regular perfumes a break and use this one now since I've had no adverse reactions from it, it smells really nice, and get a lot of compliments about it.

AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: lootaan 500 Pieces False Nails French Acrylic Fake Nails Tips Half Cover Artificial Fake Nails With Box and False Nail Clipper for Women Girl
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: These tips were so easy to apply, file, and shape. I love using them. I needed them to cover my nails so I can use the min dipping powder. They worked exceptionally well. I was able to file them down to look like my normal nails would and the powder was able to apply and bond to them well. I also tried gel nail polish over a few of them and the gel also bonded to the nails well. They felt really light and very flexible once I clipped and filed them. Pretty sure I can use these for a lot more versus the full cover nails. BTW that's my pointer finger not my middle finger in the single finger picture.

AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.product_description: Transparent Flexible Silicon Wig Grip Headband, 2Pcs Wig Bands for Making Wigs, Soft Drop-Shaped Wig Hair Bands Scarf, Elastic Grip Band For Wigs Running Sport Headband (Light Brown+Transparent)
AFPQJSBCMEKL3PT54KPROBQ2TAXA.review_text: I used this on an older wig and a newer one. It held both wigs in place fairly well. It wasn't too tight around my head and held everything together but I wouldn't want to wear it for extremely long periods of time. I didn't have to worry about my wig flying away because it was too windy outside. Moving my head around while it was on took a little adjusting to but after about 30 minutes I was fine and forgot I even had it on. What I really like about this is that I don't have to worry anymore about the back of my own hair getting clipped or stuck on the installed wig clips and elastic latch. I have this issues even with regular wig caps. The band prevents that from happening which is a plus for me because the latch can sit over the band.

AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.product_description: UNNY CLUB Cover Glow Cushion 0.3 Oz / 11g Beige Color SPF50+, Flawless Gloss Cushion Powder Complex Single Layer Concealer Cover Moisture Essence Tight Fit, Korea Cosmetics (No.23 Natural Beige)
AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.review_text: I have beige undertones in my skin.  I got the beige and it's a little dark.  It does however, work great for contouring.  It has a nice suntan glow.  The compact is made very well.  It has a mirror in the lid.  It comes with a soft puff for applying.  The color is packed into a foam pad.  But it lifts easily with the puff.  It goes on lightly.  If you want a more dramatic look, just add more.  There is no fragrance.  I love that!  I won't be using this all over my face, so I am not sure about the SPF.  If it matched better, it would be perfect.  Really gives you a suntanned glow.

AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.product_description: 2PCS Portable Electric Toothbrush Travel Case, Plastic Travel Toothbrush Container Holder Suitable for Oral-B, Philips Sonicare and Other Electric Toothbrush Set (Black and White)
AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.review_text: I use an electric tooth brush at home.  Every time we travel, I leave it at home.  There was just no way of carrying it to keep it sanitary.  I have put it in an ziploc bag but it gets nasty after using several times.  I have a Soni Care rechargeable toothbrush.  It fits in this perfectly.  This is a plastic case and can easily be cleaned with soap and water.  The handle of the tooth brush fits snugly in the plastic grips.  It has other grips for the brush head.  I can easily fit in a travel size toothpaste as well.  This all closes up tightly with an outside latch.  Great case!

AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.product_description: HOOJIH Hair Topper, 12" Wavy Wiglet Hairpieces Clips in Hair Extensions for Women with Thinning Hair Add Volume and Coverage - Brown with Highlight
AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.review_text: Well, I finally got a hair topper that actually matches my hair.  That is so hard to get.  The hair on this is a little shiny but not bad.  I can spray it with dry shampoo and it dulls it some.  So, that's not a problem.  It has (3) clips - one on each side and in the back.  I would like a clip in front also.  I have some small clips I can sew in to help the front stay in place.  The part on this is very fake looking.  But most of them are.  I sprayed it with root touch up spray.  That helps a lot!  But I haven't been able to figure out how to use this without it being totally flat on top of my head.  It just screams fake!  The hair is very thick also.  I will have to thin it out and cut the length off some.  There's a lot you have to do to make this presentable.  I will keep working with it.

AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.product_description: Rose Quartz Roller with Derma Roller 0.25mm, Facial Kit with Microneedle and Pink Jade Rollers
AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.review_text: I love the combination of these two rollers.  The microneedle roller is great for rolling your face before applying moisturizer.  It helps your skin absorb it better.  I also use it on my eyebrows.  I have very sparse eyebrows.  I am applying hair growth serum on them.  I roll my eyebrows, apply the serum and then roll it again to help it get better absorbed.  It really seems to be helping!  I have fine hairs growing back in.  I also like the derma roller.  I put it in the refrigerator.  It feels so good to roll over your forehead and across your eyes.  Helps to relieve headaches too.  This is a nice duo to add to your daily facial routine.

AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.product_description: Aesfee Makeup Mirror Vanity Mirror with Lights, 1x/2x/3x Magnification LED Lighted Trifold Cosmetic Mirrors, 3 Color Lighting Modes Touch Control Dimmable Countertop Illuminated Mirrors - White
AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.review_text: I can't say anything bad about the light this mirror provides.  It has three light levels.  I usually just use the same one.  The daylight one can be a little too much.  You can definitely see every flaw in your face!  I like that you can use this with batteries or USB charged.  I have so many other things plugged into my outlets.  This is just one less.  There are two fold out mirrors - one on top on the left side and one on the bottom on the right side.  They have different levels of magnification.  Those would be a little better if they were a little larger.  The middle mirror is the perfect size though.  This stands up on a base.  I just wish the mirror tilted back a bit farther.  It's kind of difficult to do my eyebrows without lowering my head down.  I may make a stand for it to lift it up about 2 -3".  But it's a nice light and magnification.

AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.product_description: M-BOX Straight Short Bob Wig Women’s Bob Wig With Bangs Heat Resistant Fiber Hair Synthetic Wig None Lace Cosplay Wigs Natural Looking（#30 14inch）
AFBUKVT3KQFLL4X536HS4KKBBJ7Q.review_text: First off, the top part looks very realistic.  It's not a flat part.  It's staggered.  You can work with it and it looks very realistic.  There are virtually no bangs on this.  The front hairline looks fake.  I am going to try to cut some bangs and see if that helps the look.  But the hair color is not to my liking.  It has orange highlights.  But mostly around the front!  There's large clumps in the front and the back is mixed in better.  I tried spraying it with root touch up spray to tone them down some.  The hair is shiny.  You will have to use dry shampoo on it to get rid of some of that.  It does not come with any wig clips inside.  It does have the adjustable strap.  I wish there weren't so many issues with this wig.  I love the realistic part!!  The best I've seen in any wig.

AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.product_description: Everyday Beauty Strawberry Exfoliator, Nourishing, Hydrating, and Rich Antioxidant Exfoliating Scrub with Ginseng, Strawberry Seeds, and Black Currant for Dry Dehydrated, and Aging Skin, 1.7 oz. Jar
AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.review_text: The smell is more strawberry rhubarb but it's like a facial cream in texture. Ultra smooth going on. You can feel the moisturizing as you use this. You can use it with your fav scrubby for enhanced sensation and exfoliating. Leaves skin clean and glowing. Skin feels nourished, refreshed. Good stuff!!!

AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.product_description: Wax Beads, LEMONTRA 1lb Hard Wax Beads for Hair Removal, Wax Beans for Brazilian Waxing, Hard Wax for Sensitive Skin with Aloe Vera Formula, Waxing Beads for Eyebrow Bikini Legs Facial for Women Men
AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.review_text: After 2 months of use I can say I'm very happy with this brand. I will try another fragrance from them this time just for a difference. the pellets melt evenly in my pot and went on easier. I DO use an exfoliator in conjunction with this wax to prevent ingrown hairs but I'm happy with the fragrance and am excited to try their others. After 6 weeks I noticed my leg hair decreased in size and stiffness so that's a huge plus. Awesome company. Awesome product.

AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.product_description: MEIQIER Eye Massager with Natural Quartz Jade, Facial Massage Tool with Heat & Vibration for Eliminate Eye Bags, Dark Circle Remover Eye Lip Fine Lines, Promote Essence Absorption
AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.review_text: I use this every day. While I'm brushing my teeth and getting ready for my day. It cane with no instructions but its fairly easy to figure out. Too, just come back to the product description online and read how to use it. Charged pretty quick and lasts about 4 days on one charge.  The laugh lines and frown lines are slowly loosing their depth and overall, my skin tone has evened out quite a bit. I'm happy with it. Its quick, very convenient and does offer results with disciplined use. Try it!!

AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.product_description: MRTREUP Neon Face Paint UV Glow Body Paint Water Activated Eyeliner , 6 Colors Cake Eyelier Fluorescent Hydra Graphic Pink Green Glow in the Dark Body Paint for Club Halloween Party Makeup Art Paint
AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.review_text: Could not be easier to use. Wet brush and start painting. Deeply pigmented,  long lasting.  I love these and will absolutely buy them again.

AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.product_description: Olive And Avocado Hair Mask For Hair Growth And Dry Damaged Hair By BACC Beauty And Care - Treatment With Natural Extracts | Deep Moisturizer | Hydrates | Repairs And Soften | Hair Mask For Dry Damaged Hair For Women And Men - 18.5 Fl Oz 550ml
AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.review_text: I needed a mask for my very long, dry hair. Avocado is so good for your hair and I'm overall, pretty happy with this product. I left it in longer than suggested bc my hair is so dry. When I rinsed it out and towel dried my hair, I could see the curls coming back. The longer I use it, the more it nourishes my hair. I will absolutely get this again and again. Would be nice to have a yummy fragrance but I'm still loving my hair after using this.

AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.product_description: Organic Patchouli Beard Wash by American Shaving Co, Rich, Foaming Cleanser that Softens, cleanse & Strengthens the beard hair, Clean and Refresh your beard with Patchouli Fragrance - 8 oz
AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.review_text: The fragrance is not over powering,  just enough. It deeply cleaned my hair of buildup from styling products. Literally squeaky clean. AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.product_description: Vitamasques Cica Green Tea Jelly Facial Cleanser Gentle pH Cleanser is Refreshing, Cleansing & Exfoliating for Smooth, Clean & Radiant Skin - Vegan, Free from Parabens & Gluten
AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.review_text: While yes, it deep cleaned my skin it also dried it out terribly.  Great lather but I couldn't wash it off fast enough. I nearly vomited. Its truely awful. AFN6RQAVUB7FV3C7IYGDHQW3BZPQ.product_description: VOFEL Jelly Masks for Facials Mask Powder for Moisturizing Anti Aging Jelly Face Mask Peel Off 9 Pcs

AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.product_description: LUXAZA 6 PCS Khaki Brown Neutral Eyeshadow Stick Set, Cream Eye Shadow Pencil Makeup, Shimmer And Matte Eye Pencil,Brightener Highlighter Eyeliner Crayon Make up
AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.review_text: These glide on perfectly and look really nice.  I love how easily these are to use....the brush on the other end makes these blend beautifully on my eyes.  Love the dramatic colors and still neutral enough too.  Really nice and they look great in my makeup drawer.

AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.product_description: HOMOST Starry Magnetic Cat Eye Gel Nail Polish Set, 6PCS Galactic Auroras Chameleon Gel Nail Polish Kit With Magnet
AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.review_text: Soo easy to use and so pretty!! I probably had both hands done in 15 minutes, so it didn’t take long to do or figure out. Also had it on almost a week and still looks like new. I highly recommend this set, great colors and really easy to apply!

AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.product_description: Polish Due nails | Stretchable Real Nail Polish Strips| Gloss Solid Color, Ombre , French, Pattern, Glitter Finish 16Pcs | Includes Nail Wipe, Nail File, Instructional Brochure (Serenity Now)
AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.review_text: Love these for a quick manicure to go!  I am very lazy when it comes to doing my nails and this is the perfect product for me. These looked pretty nice and lasted a little better than polish for me, but not as long as I'd hoped and for that I did take off.  But for quick and easy, these do the trick!  I did notice that the photo shows them sparkly and mine were not?  These lasted about 4-5 days, but I am also in water a lot and pretty rough on my nails.

AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.product_description: SportsWell Flexible Reusable Bun Deft Bun for Hair Magic Donut Hair Bun Maker French Twist Hair Tool Bun Crown Twister #1
AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.review_text: It might work for a different hair type, but just ok for fine hair.  I have the real Carlin one and this one is not made as well and does not work as well with all hair types...but it might for yours?

AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.product_description: Claireceuticals Sweet Almond Oil for Hair, Face & Skin - Organic Almond Oil for Skin - Pure Almond Oil Moisturizer for Dry Skin - Facial Moisturizer for Women - Ideal Dandruff Remover - 1.69 Fl Oz

AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.product_description: invisibobble Sprunchie Spiral Hair Ring - True Black - Scrunchie Stylish Bracelet, Strong Elastic Grip Coil Accessories for Women - Gentle for Girls Teens and Thick Hair

Holds well and looks nice with the velour type fabric.  The only thing is this size might not work well for someone with really thick hair? This scrunchie really holds well...I wear it all day and overnight and it doesn't budge and feels very comfortable,  not too tight.

AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.product_description: Bath Bombs, SAZEN Bath Bomb with Natural & Organic Essential Oils, Shea Coconut Butter for Skin Moisturize, Bubble Spa Bath, Birthday Mothers Day Christmas Handmade Gift Set for Women Kids Her Him
AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.review_text: These are a good set of bath bombs....that do add oils and scent to my bath.  I like the selection of scents in this set and the fizz is pretty good.  I did take off one star due to size as these are on the small to medium in size and I have a very large tub, so I need to use 2 of these to get enough moisturizing product in my tub.

AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.product_description: Shakira Perfumes - Dance for Women - Long Lasting - Femenine, Charming and Modern Perfume - Fruity Floral Notes - Ideal for Day Wear - 1.7 Fl Oz
AEKV4Q3JUQTQA2UR7PH7QLUHUTTQ.review_text: ***Edited to add that this kept reminding me of something else I'd worn and now I'm thinking it is very similar to BBW Into the Night.***.  I was very pleasantly surprised by this scent....I like dark orientals and even though this is listed as floral gourmand, it fits the bill as a dark oriental for me.  I definitely get the base notes of vanilla, cocoa, tonka and benzoin....it is very reminiscent of a scent I used to wear a long time ago, but can't quite place it?  Maybe Euphoria?  Not sure, but this is a really nice rich dark scent that is heavier on the gourmand side than floral.  This is for sure a date night scent.

AH2LTMRG3MQNGRZYPPCOJF4KPS3A.product_description: Avajar Blue LED Hydrating Cream Mask 5 Pack - Hydrating Face Masks for Women | Moisturizing Face Mask for Girls | Collagen Face Sheet Masks Set | Korean Face Mask Sheets Pack | Sheet Mask For Face

No skin irritation experience so that’s a good thing.
Beside the texture, I am happy with the overall experience with this lotion.

PROS
* portable
* easy to use just need to get use to the setting and what you prefer heat wise
* the LCD is easy to see
CONS
* battery doesn’t last a long time so if you have a longer thicker hair you may not curl them all, not sure if it’s just my unit but just fyi
* charging is decent BUT I’m disappointed that the charging time is longer than the time I can use it.
* the clip and comb that comes with it is not the best kind and really cheap imho, I guess it’s better than nothing

AGZYMSCZZ5SPWHX5AVWTP64TY7AA.product_description: FIDDY898 Women Flower Headband Wreath Crown Floral Wedding Garland Wedding Festivals Photo Props-A PINK IVORY

I want to use this for my photo shoots and I’m extremely disappointed. The materials are extremely cheap, I can honestly make one better by buying $2 worth of flowers and leaves in the dollar store. I know I’m getting plastic garland BUT this is just too cheap for my taste.
The color is very dull, nothing like the photo and it is flat. I have to constantly fix it to make it look better and most of the time I am just too annoyed to even use it.

This took more than a month to arrived but I’m glad I waited. This looks exactly as advertised and my favorite is the mirror! The mirror looks very clear and is easy to clean.

Is $22 worth it? I honestly think it is too much but if you want convenience of finding a simple sweet gift to give to your girl friend/daughter/sister this makes it worth it.

AGZYMSCZZ5SPWHX5AVWTP64TY7AA.product_description: TODAYADAY’s Baby Foot Peel Mask for Dry Cracked Feet (3 Pairs) - Removes & Repairs Rough Heels - Moisturizing Feet Peeling Mask for Callus and Dead Skin

I have size 7.5 wide feet and I have no issues using this. I think if you have a bigger feet 10.5+ it maybe an issue.
The scent is a bit strong for my preference when I first open the packet BUT it gets better after I apply it.
It is well moisten so my feet feels good after I put it on.
If you have hick calluses you may need to use another one after the 1st peel.
Over all I’m very happy with my experience and will definitely get this once my 3 packets are used.

AGZYMSCZZ5SPWHX5AVWTP64TY7AA.product_description: ZURO Black Wig With Bangs Cosplay Short Wigs for Women Hot Pink Dark Brown Blonde Wavy Colorful Wigs for Girls Soft Cute Costume Wigs Shoulder Length Wave Bob Wigs for Women (black)

AGXMWJK3YL4SV5FJ27JEJZPZHRBA.product_description: Success at Once Self Straight Magic Perm at Home Easy & Fast Made in Korea
AGXMWJK3YL4SV5FJ27JEJZPZHRBA.review_text:
I have semi-curly but puffy hair that I need to tame at least once every 3-4 months. Otherwise, I have to straighten my hair every day to look decent. I have been using this Japanese product which is a 2-step for the straightening and neutralizing. It usually takes a total of 3 hours or more to go through the entire process, with 45 mins session for each treatment steps and then the drying and straightening hair in between. I was really intrigued with the one-step because it saves so much time.

The order comes with magic straightening kit to do at home. There are instruction manuals in both Korean and English. It gives you step by step instructions that are very clear and easy to follow. The bottle already comes with the treatment. All you need to do it apply. Before you do this, there are hair treatment packets to use prior and after the treatment to protect your hair from excessive damage. The kit also comes with plastic cover for your shoulders and a brush for application.

I applied it over the top area because my hair is pretty long and really you should only target the new hair growth if you've done the treatment previously. If it was my first time I probably would not have enough treatment for my long hair. I would need to order two.

The instruction states to check after 10 minutes. Every hair is different so you will have to assess if you need to leave it on longer. The instruction specifies the duration and also guides you on how to check if your hair is ready to be washed out. If you pull one strand and you notice the curls are gone, then it's probably time to wash them. I left mine on for 40 minutes. I don't recommend it but I needed to from past experience because my hair is crazy. You rinse out the treatment but it tells you not to rub them. Just wash them through gently with your fingers. I applied the hair mist after washing it out, because you can feel the hair stiffen. Then I proceeded to blow dry and straighten the hair.

I washed my hair again after 2 days and sure enough the treatment worked. I do feel that because of the dryness, I still need to straighten the hair some, but definitely better than having to sit every morning and straighten the entirety of the hair.

For an avid magic straightening perm treatment user, I do recommend the product. I suggest getting additional product to make sure you revive your hair after treatment.

AGXMWJK3YL4SV5FJ27JEJZPZHRBA.product_description: 9 Pcs Silicone Makeup Brush Cover, Reusable Dustproof Makeup Brush Protector Cap,Travel Makeup Brush Storage Holder, 2 Styles with 4 Sizes for Different Sizes Makeup Brush
AGXMWJK3YL4SV5FJ27JEJZPZHRBA.review_text: The order comes with 9 pieces of the silicone makeup brush covers. There are two (2) different sizes for covering different type of brushes. One type for larger brush for like foundation and the other type of smaller brushes like eye shadow. The cover provides good protection over the brush but also protects the bag that would hold this brush from leaving powder or color marks. The protection part is good but I had mad struggle trying to get the silicone cover on my make up brush. It's not easy and it has an extremely strong grip. Once its grips on something it is so hard to remove or slide down to use the brush.

The order comes with one (1) mold remover that comes in a bottle. it comes with a cone shaped cap that you replace so you can dispense the mold remover gel. It allows for you to get to the corners and edges where the mold builds up and it's hard to scrub unless you have a thin brush to work with.

The gel is clear and you squeeze the bottle for it to come out. It's pretty much the gel sitting on top of a molded sealant in my showers that is supposed to slowly kill the mold and you remove it by wiping it down a few hours later. The gel clumps and it stays there. I have seen it work slowly but it does not remove much of the built up mold.

AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.product_description: Elegant Compact Lighted Makeup Mirror for Travel, Purse and Handbags,1X and 10X Magnifying Handheld Makeup Mirror with 12 LEDs Lights,Double Side LED Travel Makeup Mirror(White)
AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.review_text: This is a really nice lighted, mirrored compact!  So many times, the lights aren't bright enough to do you much good, there's only a single regular mirror, and/or the size is just too small to give you a proper look.  Not so with this compact.  You get two mirrors for the price of one, a regular mirror and one with a higher magnification for those times when you need a closer inspection.  The light has a lovely, and very helpful, color temperature that's pretty close to daylight, just a bit warmer, and is featured around both mirrors.  It's operated by a switch on the bottom, so you aren't wasting your batteries.  It runs off of two coin batteries.  The mirror is larger than most.  I have larger than average hands for a woman, and this compact is bigger than my palm.  It's a great size for quick once overs and more detailed makeup application.  I even prefer using it over my bathroom mirror for doing my eyebrows.

AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.product_description: C.O. Bigelow No. 007 Dr Hiosous Quince Hand Lotion, 4 Ounces
AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.review_text: After falling in love with the C.O. Bigelow Rose Salve, I knew I had to give this a try.  I haven't been disappointed with the results.  Not only does it have a sweet, citrusy smell, it also moisturizes and softens my dry, chapped skin.  I deal with dry hands in the winter and I'm a big hand washer, so I end up with rough, cracked skin.  This light yellow, creamy hand lotion has helped to keep my hands from feeling like sandpaper without leaving them greasy.

I thought this would be a fun wig to wear to bed, if you get my drift.  It's cute and the colors are blended together nicely, with small streak of lavender mixed into the blue.  The "scalp" looks great and is a nice nude color.  It mimics a Caucasian scalp really well, which is great for a pale gal like me.  The cut is sweet and it's styled well.  The bangs need trimming up but that shouldn't be a problem.  The tresses feel like all synthetic wigs do.  They are wavy but still have that plastic feel to them.  The big issue for me is the size of the wig cap itself.  I have black hair and the wig "scalp" is so short that several inches of the top of my natural hair shows through it.  It does come with a hair cap but oddly, it's black and not nude, which would be the smarter choice.  I have a nude hair cap that I'll be trying with it, but I'm not expecting much difference.  The wig is just too small in general.

AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.product_description: Ultrasonic Skin Scrubber aka Facial Spatula by YOOVE | Face & Body Exfoliator Scrub, Comedone Extractor & Blackhead Remover | 2019 Premium Beauty Tool
AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.review_text: I'll be honest.  I was rather skeptical when I received this.  It looks sleek and pretty but does it actually work?  My answer to that question is a resounding YES.  You wouldn't think a little buzzing device could make your skincare products do their best job but boy, oh, boy does it ever.  The three settings are for Cleansing (also used for extractions), Moisturizing, and Lifting.  Each setting causes the device to vibrate at different speeds and achieve different goals.  Using it is fairly easy.  Hold the button until you hear it turn on and then give the button a quick press to choose between functions.  There are lights above each mode and they will light up when you are on said mode.  The included instructions are very easy to follow and explain how to use it in a simple way.  It's all about keeping very light pressure, while holding the side bars, which add the effective charge to the device, allowing the ionization process to take place.  I have seen a difference in my skin already and I have only used it in each mode 3-4 times.  It could be easy to overdo it after seeing the results you do, but the instructions specifically advice you on how often each function should be used so the skin isn't having reverse effects from what you want it to.  I think the price for this item is fantastic!  I have a reduction in blackheads, my skin seems to glow after use, and my products are sinking into my skin better and faster.  This one for the win!

AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.product_description: The Beachwaver Co. Dual Voltage, S1, White
AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.review_text: I'm someone with extremely thick and stick straight hair.  My hair loses curl within an hour of me fixing it.  I've tried other rotating curling irons and haven't had much success with them, so I didn't have very high expectations for this beach waver.  I have been pleasantly surprised.  Once I got the hang of it, I found it to be pretty easy to use.  It features buttons that allow you to chooses which direction you would like to curl each section of hair, and a Home button that after each use, and after the previous section of hair is no longer attached, allows the barrel to return to a neutral starting point.  I ran into an issue the first few times I used it, which was accidentally hitting the home button while my hair was still around the barrel.  This caused the hair to get very tight and the barrel to press up against the scalp.  This is very easy to do and I definitely think a design change should take place to correct this issue.  The barrel is long enough for my medium-long hair and I can see it needing to be used more than once up and down the length of long hair.  The curling iron gets up to 410 degrees max, which works pretty well on my thick hair.  I've tried fixing my hair in different ways after using it, to see which method holds the curls longer.  I still have an issue with my hair losing the curls a bit to quickly but it's remedied by using styling products before and after curling it.  To be honest, I think this beach waver is very overpriced.  Maybe the results would be better for someone with thinner hair but I don't think I'd pay more than $50 for this curling iron.  Nice results, but the design flaws make this a product I won't reach for that often.

AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.product_description: ELEVEN EVER Electric Nail Drill, Professional Portable Nail File Drill Grinder Manicure Pedicure Tools for Polishing, Sanding, Removing Gel and Acrylic Nails (silver) … (silver) (ND-02black)
AGSTQ3JDGW2TZB5XKBF7PD2DJOKQ.review_text: I've always wanted to get into the art of doing my own acrylics so when I saw this drill set, I knew I had to review it.  Firstly, it comes with numerous accessories- a fluffy brush for removing dust from the nail and work area, a set of to separaters for painting, a nail board, and the drill bits themselves.  The entire set is nicely packaged and comes nestled in a velvety foam materials.  The bits are held in their own clear container within the box.  The set comes with a detachable adapter that plugs into the end of the drill and then into the wall outlet.  The drill itself is small enough to handle pretty easily, although I can see where it would be difficult for someone with smaller hands than myself (I have large hands.)  Inserting and removing the bits can be a challenge.  The mechanism isn't well made so I have to fight with it.  The power cord is much too short and I had to use an extension cord to give myself some wiggle room away from the wall outlet.  Some of the bits' textures do a better job than the others, while some don't do anything at all.  The over all look and feel of the set isn't worth the price, in my opinion.  It works a bit too awkwardly to be something I'd use that often.
